explanation: The requirement states that, after the system's power has been off for more than 15 minutes, the user should not be able to select 'Resume Ventilation'. Since the provided atomic propositions do not include a direct encoding of the elapsed time after power off, but do include 'off' (system completely de-energized and off) and 'resumeVentilation' (Resume Ventilation selected), we translate the restriction as: once the system returns from being off (i.e., system has been off), if the duration exceeds 15 minutes (acknowledged, but can't encode timing with logic over existing atomic propositions), then 'resumeVentilation' must never be true. With the existing atomic propositions, we express this as: 'after the system has been off, it must never be possible to select Resume Ventilation.' Timing nuances (15 minutes) are not directly translatable, so are excluded per instructions and available atoms.
decision1_substring: Once the power of the system has been off
decision3_substring: it shall not be possible to select “Resume Ventilation”
